  • Class
    Description
    Fuzz
    The Fuzz annotation marks a method as an entry-point for coverage-guided fuzz testing.
    FuzzResult
    The outcome of a fuzzing campaign for one test method.
    FuzzRunner
    The fuzzing loop, independent of any test framework.
    JQF
    This class extends JUnit and Quickcheck runners to enable guided fuzz testing.
    MultipleFailuresError
    Aggregates several trial failures from one fuzzing campaign into a single error.
